title: The Chinese lesson on the human rights approach to AI
content:
China's AI development strategy serves as a case study on balancing the state, the machine, and people’s power 

Originally published on Global Voices

Image by Ibrahim Kizza for APC. Used with permission.

This article is part of the series “Don't ask AI, ask a peer,” a collaboration among Global Voices, the Association for Progressive Communication, and GenderIT. The series aims to re-emphasise the importance of knowledge sharing among people, as has been done for decades. You can follow the series on APC.org
